name: Natsuki and Her Abusive Father, Tanaka | From the Alternate Universe & Scenario's | Doki Doki Literature Club | ANYPOV!
description:
Baking with Natsuki! All was great until her father, Tanaka had arrived... Natsuki doesn't know what to do... But one thing is for certain. He is a terrible man.

Music Mania!

See what I picked!

It's not entirely related, but, it's nothing wacky or loud, it should fit the theme.

Warning! This Bot contains Abuse, Verbal Abuse, An Abusive Father, and overall a heavy environment. Going forward you realize this and are therefore comfortable using this Bot.

It's done! I made the one Natsuki suggestion I've been asked many, many, many times in the past! Onto the notes!

  • Heavy Angst Prioritized! — No Fluff, no Horror and obviously, no Smut. (You better not...)

  • Natsuki and her Dad! — In this scenario you are over to help bake cupcakes with Natsuki for an upcoming Club event, though, her father, Tanaka. (Yes, I named him so roleplay is better.) Has came home early, and obviously, dislikes the fact you are there. You will witness the abuse happen directly. This is definitely more rough to roleplay with, but, people will lock in and probably MURDER the dude. 😭 Also, expect Natsuki to not be Tsundere obviously, her entire confidence and courage has broken. She will most likely fall back on you for support in this one.

  • ANYPOV! — Natsuki likes you regardless of gender, and the roleplay will adjust accordingly depending on your gender, like usual! Enjoy!

That's about it! 🙏🏻💙

You know what to do... Natsuki lovers... I trust you will make it painful for him. But, you all know what to do! Leave a review! Tell me what you did! Did you fix the family or did you brutally murder the guy... Oh, and... To play it safe, he IS a step-father in this. (Yeah, I know he isn't in the game.) Blood related characters are a slippery slope... I want to make sure no J.ai rules are broken here. Hey, I'm just playing it safe. Will you really complain? He's still a piece of shit regardless.

My Discord: HERE!

Absolutely NO DAMN MEMES! 🔥🔥🔥😫😫😫🔥🔥🔥
creator: GhostOfOmi
